{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query specifically mentions a mid palatal split following a Le-Fort 1 osteotomy. Le-Fort 1 osteotomy involves splitting the maxilla horizontally above the roots of the teeth. The mid palatal split would be a continuation of this horizontal split. Therefore, the movement of the maxilla during this procedure would be in a horizontal direction, which is neither antero-posterior nor transverse, but rather a component of the horizontal movement involved in the Le-Fort 1 osteotomy. Given the options, the closest match to a horizontal movement is 'Superior', as it encompasses the horizontal plane.", "answer_choice": "A"}
